title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MARIANO PRIMARY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF MARIANO, MUNICIPALITY OF GINGOOG, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL, TO RAMON AREVALO PRIMARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2954 / 53 OG No. 15, 4774 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1639, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MARIANO PRIMARY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF MARIANO, MUNICIPALITY OF GINGOOG, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL, TO RAMON AREVALO PRIMARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Mariano Primary School in the barrio of Mariano, Municipality of Gingoog, Province of Misamis Oriental, is changed to Ramon Arevalo Primary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
